title: outgoing TxRecord block_height frozen at broadcast time, never updated to confirmed height
description: send_payment inserts TxRecord with block_height = scan_tip (the height at broadcast, before the tx is mined). The notes table uses INSERT OR IGNORE / duplicate detection, so when the scanner later sees this tx it does not overwrite the block_height with the actual confirmation height. Any code that computes confirmations from block_height will be off by ~1-3 blocks. Not a critical bug today (confirmations aren't shown), but will cause silent errors when confirmation-depth UI lands. Fix: either (a) use a sentinel like block_height=0 for 'pending' and update on scan, or (b) document explicitly that outgoing-tx block_height is broadcast height, not confirmation height.
